description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, swept-back wings, and a pair of large turbofan engines mounted under the wings. The aircraft features a distinctive upward-curved wingtip design, known as raked wingtips, which enhances aerodynamic efficiency. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with two main gear units under the wings and a nose gear under the forward fuselage. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, featuring a multi-panel windshield and several passenger windows along the sides. The livery is primarily white with blue accents and the number '787' prominently displayed on the tail fin.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet airliner with swept-back wings, underwing engines, and a blue-accented tail marked '787'. Features include raked wingtips, a conventional tail, and a forward-mounted cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, the '787' tail marking, and both engines under the wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wingspan, raked wingtips, and the symmetry of the tail and engines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the fuselage, engines, and tail design.
description_view_3: Frontal view emphasizing the nose, cockpit windows, engine intakes, and the forward sweep of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings featuring pronounced raked wingtips and a slight upward dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan underwing engines, one mounted beneath each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-seat configuration and a multi-panel windshield.
